2025-10-12T18:08:04.3030980Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --unset-all http.https://github.com/.extraheader
2025-10-12T18:08:04.3061568Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2025-10-12T18:08:04.3382443Z Cleaning up orphan processes
